personas.name: External Admin Endpoint Hunter
personas.description: An anonymous external actor scanning for exposed admin endpoints.
personas.goal: Discover and reach admin-only endpoints from outside the org.

personas.name: Credential Stuffing Bot
personas.description: Automated bot replaying leaked credentials against the login endpoint.
personas.goal: Gain a valid session via reused/leaked credentials.

personas.name: Malicious Insider RM
personas.description: A relationship manager abusing legitimate access to over-collect client data.
personas.goal: Exfiltrate client records beyond their book of business.

personas.name: Report Export Abuser
personas.description: A user repeatedly exporting full reports to bulk-extract data.
personas.goal: Bulk-export sensitive reporting data for exfiltration.

personas.name: Stale Account User
personas.description: A dormant/former-employee account that is still active and being used.
personas.goal: Use leftover access from a stale account to reach internal data.
